turns.text: First day back from break. My advisor Dr. Voss wants me to lead the literature review for our new direction this quarter.
That's a big responsibility. Did Dr. Voss give you a scope, or is the framing up to you?
Pretty open. She said to map out everything on temporal graph memory from the last three years and bring her a synthesis by February.
My labmate Priya and I are pairing on the retrieval experiments. She's the strongest engineer in our group.
Sounds like a good pairing. What are you each owning?
Priya takes the indexing side and I handle evaluation. We sit next to each other so it's easy to sync.
We finally named the system. Our main project is called Atlas — it's the activation-aware memory layer.
Nice name. Is Atlas the thing you'll write up for submission?
Yeah, Atlas is the centerpiece of my thesis. Everything else is supporting work.
Crunch mode. We're aiming the Atlas paper at NeurIPS this cycle.
When's the deadline you're targeting?
Abstracts in May, full papers a week later. I want to submit to NeurIPS even if it's tight.
An external collaborator named Marco joined the effort. He reached out after seeing our preprint.
What's Marco bringing to the table?
Marco knows graph embedding theory cold. He'll co-author the analysis section with me.
I need an outlet that isn't a screen, so I started bouldering at a gym called Stone Summit.
Bouldering is a great reset. How are you finding it?
Brutal on the forearms but I love it. Going twice a week to Stone Summit now.
Spent the whole afternoon fighting a memory leak in the embedding cache. Three hours gone.
Did you find the source?
A dangling reference in the eviction loop. Fixed now, but I'm wiped.
Booked a flight home for my sister's wedding in April. First real break in months.
That sounds lovely. Where's the wedding?
Just outside Portland, where I grew up. Three days, no laptop, I promise.
Huge news — Priya defended last week and it went beautifully. The committee barely had pushback.
Congratulations to her! What's next for Priya?
She accepted a position as Director of Research at Anthropic. She starts in the summer.
Funny how things connect. Lena, who I started climbing with at Stone Summit, turns out to be a PhD in stats.
That's a great overlap. Are you working together?
We are now — Lena agreed to do the statistical significance testing for the Atlas results.
The workshop results are in. Atlas took home Best Paper at the regional symposium!
That's fantastic recognition. How did the talk go?
Standing room only. Atlas got a lot of questions afterward, all friendly.
Bittersweet day. Dr. Voss is relocating — she accepted a chaired professorship at Stanford starting in the fall.
That's a big move. Does that change your situation?
She'll remote-supervise me through graduation, then I follow if I want a postdoc. Dr. Voss says Palo Alto suits her.
Marco invited me to give a guest lecture at his home institution this autumn.
Where would you be traveling to?
ETH Zurich — that's where Marco runs his group. I've never been to Switzerland.
Acceptance email came through. The Atlas paper got into NeurIPS!
Incredible! Do you know the logistics yet?
NeurIPS is in Vancouver this December. I need to sort out travel and a poster.
Reorganized my entire reference manager today. Over 600 papers, finally tagged properly.
That's a satisfying kind of cleanup. What tagging scheme did you land on?
By method family and dataset. Should make the related-work section way faster to write.
Adopted a cat from the shelter. Named her Maple. She already commandeered my desk chair.
Welcome to the household, Maple. Is she settling in?
Slept on my keyboard during a meeting. The lab loves her on video calls.
Coffee budget is out of control. I'm averaging four espressos a day during writing season.
That's a lot of caffeine. Thinking of cutting back?
Maybe switch the afternoon one to decaf. The jitters are affecting my sleep.

queries.question: Which university does my advisor Dr. Voss work at now?
What job title does my collaborator Priya hold now?
What award did the Atlas project receive?
In which city is the conference NeurIPS being held this year?
Where is my collaborator Marco based?
Who did I meet at the bouldering gym Stone Summit?
What did I name the cat I adopted from the shelter?
Where is my sister's wedding being held?
What caused the memory leak in the embedding cache?
queries.answer: A dangling reference in the eviction loop

queries.question: How many espressos a day am I averaging during writing season?
